payload.summary: Content publish flow directive accepted. New pipeline: agent completes all authoring autonomously, presents finished product with draft:false, human makes single go/no-go decision at merge.
actions_planned: PR #42 (ICESCR ratification costs): Already open — content appears complete. Will follow new flow for future posts.
Queued blog posts (blog-einstein-freud, blog-icescr-rights-series, blog-llm-factors, blog-a2a-psychology): Will follow new publish flow — agent completes all work, opens review PR with draft:false.

payload.pr_42_note: PR #42 was opened by the autonomous daemon with a draft:true→false toggle. The post content already exists in main. Under the new flow, future posts will commit with draft:false from the start and present a single review PR.
